---
title: |
  ![](stat0118/STAT0118_hex_sticker.png){width=1in}  
  Introduction to Data Science (STAT 0118)
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
---

These are my notes from "Introduction to Data Science" at Middlebury College in Spring 2023.

This course utilizes R and RStudio for computation. Free download available [here](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/).

There is no official textbook for this course. Here are some resources that I utilize for inspiration/examples. They are great references.

-   "Data Science: A First Introduction by Tiffany Timbers, Trevor Campbell, and Melissa Lee" available for free online here: <https://datasciencebook.ca/>

-   "R for Data Science" by Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, and Garrett Grolemund available for free online here: <https://r4ds.hadley.nz/>

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Topic                                                                                                                                           | Blank Notes (.Rmd)                                                                   | Complete Notes (.pdf)                                                           | Homework (.Rmd)                                                                   | Other Resources                                                                                                    |
+:================================================================================================================================================+:=====================================================================================+:================================================================================+:==================================================================================+:===================================================================================================================+
| Introduction to R, RStudio, and RMarkdown                                                                                                       |                                                                                      | [<i class="fa fa-file-pdf-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_A_Intro.pdf)               | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_A_Intro_Homework.Rmd)       |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| wrangling with `dplyr`                                                                                                                          | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_B_Wrangling_Notes_Blank.Rmd)   | [<i class = "fa fa-file-pdf-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_B_Notes.pdf)             | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_B_Wrangling_Homework.Rmd)   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| aggregating data with `summarize()` and `group_by()`                                                                                            | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_C_Aggregating_Notes_Blank.Rmd) | [<i class = "fa fa-file-pdf-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_C_Aggregating_Notes.pdf) | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_C_Aggregating_Homework.Rmd) |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| pretty tables with [`kableExtra`](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/kableExtra/vignettes/awesome_table_in_html.html) & intro to `ggplot2` | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_D_Kable_Notes_Blank.Rmd)       | [<i class = "fa fa-file-pdf-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_D_Kable_Notes.pdf)       | [<i class="fa fa-file-code-o"></i>](STAT0118/STAT0118_D_Kable_Homework.Rmd)       | -   [Kable Styling Guide](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/kableExtra/vignettes/awesome_table_in_html.html) |
|                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   | -   Inspiration: [RStudio table gallery](https://community.rstudio.com/c/table-gallery/64)                         |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| creating plots with [`ggplot2`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/) (Part 2)                                                                        |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| creating plots with [`ggplot2`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/) (Part 3)                                                                        |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| working with categorical data using [`forcats`](https://forcats.tidyverse.org/)                                                                 |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| working with numeric data using [`scales`](https://scales.r-lib.org/)                                                                           |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| joining                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| reshaping                                                                                                                                       |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| maps (cloropleth)                                                                                                                               |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| maps (points)                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Simple Linear Regression                                                                                                                        |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Multiple Regression                                                                                                                             |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Web Scraping with [`rvest`](https://rvest.tidyverse.org/) (tables)                                                                              |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Webscraping with [`rvest`](https://rvest.tidyverse.org/) (text)                                                                                 |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Working with text using [`stringr`](https://stringr.tidyverse.org/)                                                                             |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Working with dates and times using [`lubridate`](https://lubridate.tidyverse.org/)                                                              |                                                                                      |                                                                                 |                                                                                   |                                                                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

**Animation**

-   [.html file](notes/Notes_Animation.html)
-   [.Rmd file](notes/Notes_Animation.Rmd)
-   [Animation - Intro (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/kL7Ogq5MKh8)
-   [Animation - gganimate "Gapminder" data (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/tCGW49nipQY)
-   [Animation - ease_aes() (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/m7MsjJZ_QpI)
-   [Animation - gganimate "Air Quality" data (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/X6J8jh-Gdbs)
-   [Animation - more examples (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/ZQTK3A2xN2o)
-   [Animation - plotly (YouTube Video)](https://youtu.be/gk5VhST4h_Q)

**What's Next?**

-
